# UC-23.8.5 · Customer Acquisition Cost and Payback Period (SaaS Unit Economics)

## Description

Quantifies blended customer-acquisition cost where the numerator sums sales-plus-marketing outlay for a closed month and the denominator counts distinct net-new subscriber identities using coalesce(AccountId,customer_id,account_id,organization_id), then computes CAC payback months as that cost divided by monthly ARPU multiplied by gross-margin percentage, derives simple lifetime value from contribution margin divided by logo churn, and emits LTV divided by CAC versus policy guardrails—optionally layering ChartMogul plus HubSpot plus Pendo-derived usage context so multi-source aggregation reconciles before board materials ship. Companion summary-index replay adds cohort-month streamstats for twelve rolling contribution dollars to contrast short-horizon blended payback against long-cycle enterprise reality and rep-tier-by-segment splits when Opportunity metadata carries seller segment keys.

## Value

Bessemer Venture Partners Cloud Index twenty twenty-four positions top-quartile public SaaS CAC payback around twelve months, medians roughly twelve-to-eighteen months, and elevated risk beyond twenty-four months while LTV/CAC near three-to-one counts as conventionally healthy with five-to-one illustrating top-decile capital efficiency where churn governance holds. Venture-funded roadshows now treat Rule-of-Forty posture, Magic Number momentum, and explicit payback-month trajectories as a jointly told growth story; private-equity leveraged buyout cash sweeps swing materially when payback lengthens six months because debt service absorbs margin oxygen. Joint chief financial officer, chief revenue officer, and chief marketing officer ownership stays essential because numerator line-item policy and denominator net-new semantics disagree daily across Salesforce, HubSpot, ChartMogul, and ERP pulls.

## Implementation

(1) Land Bulk API Opportunities with Amount and identifiers, HubSpot deals with aligned stages, ERP sm-cost centres through dbx:erp_sm_costs, ChartMogul or Stripe-class subscription facts with stable payer keys, Pendo Mixpanel Amplitude overlays through HEC after identity review; (2) publish gross_margin_policy.csv, churn_policy.csv, currency_policy.csv, optional new_customer_definition.csv; (3) schedule monthly economics saved searches after ERP close plus nightly churn refresh jobs; (4) alert when simple_payback_months crosses twenty-four months twice while churn_policy unchanged or ltv_cac_ratio slips below three across two closes; (5) reconcile Splunk outputs to ChartMogul workspace benchmarks and FP&A cohort spreadsheets.

## Detailed Implementation

Prerequisites
• Splunk Enterprise 9.2+ or Splunk Cloud consistent with splunkVersions; search heads grant read access to index=business plus optional index=summary_saas_unit_economics once finance approves customer-grain rollups materialised there.
• Splunk DB Connect (splunk_app_db_connect, Splunkbase 2686) execution host with JDBC paths to SAP S/4HANA actual-cost views powering sourcetype dbx:erp_sm_costs, optional Snowflake replica tables holding ChartMogul-synced dimensions, read-only credentials rotated quarterly.
• Splunk Add-on for Salesforce (Splunkbase 3549) with OAuth for Bulk API 2.0 asynchronous jobs POST https://instance.salesforce.com/services/data/v60.0/jobs/query polling GET .../jobs/{id}/results until batches complete for Opportunity Amount, StageName, CloseDate or ContractStartDate, AccountId.
• HubSpot CRM deals ingested GET https://api.hubapi.com/crm/v3/objects/deals with pipeline associations into sourcetype hubspot:deal; HubSpot Marketing Hub transactional email metrics GET https://api.hubapi.com/marketing/v3/transactional/email/stats optional overlay for programme spend tagging.
• Subscription economics landing as chartmogul:mrr_event from REST pulls GET https://api.chartmogul.com/api/v1/customers/{uuid} plus GET https://api.chartmogul.com/v1/metrics/all or JDBC warehouse mirrors; Stripe Billing GET https://api.stripe.com/v1/subscriptions; Recurly GET https://v3.recurly.com/subscriptions; Zuora REST GET /v1/object/subscription surfaced as recurly:subscription and zuora:subscription normalised fields.
• Marketo bulk programmes GET https://rest.marketo.com/rest/asset/v1/programs.json feeding campaign hierarchy lookups; product-analytics bridges POST through Splunk HTTP Event Collector into pendo:feature_agg GET https://app.pendo.io/api/v1/aggregation equivalents, mixpanel:cohort GET https://mixpanel.com/api/2.0/engage style exports, amplitude:user GET https://api.amplitude.com/api/2/users cohort pulls for PLG overlays only.
• Governance lookups under change control: gross_margin_policy.csv ym to gm_pct; churn_policy.csv ym to logo_churn_rate; currency_policy.csv ym entity to fx_policy_owner; optional new_customer_definition.csv enumerating Salesforce net-new versus HubSpot lifecycle semantics.

Step 1 — Configure data collection
Path A — ERP numerator for blended CAC: DB Connect inputs write dbx:erp_sm_costs rows with sm_cost_lc aligned to fiscal posting date in _time, distinct cost_center_id restricted to chartered sales-plus-marketing pools excluding customer-success post-sale salaries; stamp extraction_job_id for tie-outs.
Path B — Salesforce Opportunity denominator: modular inputs submit JSON Bulk jobs filtering StageName Closed Won equivalents; persist AccountId as join key; tolerate ContractStartDate versus CloseDate lag per charter.
Path C — HubSpot deal mirror: nightly JDBC or HTTPS worker emits hubspot:deal with closedate ISO strings; normalise pipeline_stage tokens before union with Salesforce wins.
Path D — Billing ARPU denominators: unify MRR feeds so payer_id equals coalesce(customer_uuid,stripe_customer_id,zuora_account_key,recurly_account_code,customer_id) before dc(payer_id) math; land Stripe rows with explicit mrr_usd.
Path E — Demand-gen programme taxonomy: join Marketo programme ids and HubSpot transactional metadata to ERP cost pools through bridge lookup demand_gen_program_map.csv so channel labels survive FP&A reorganisations.
Path F — Summary layer for cohort replay: scheduled search emitting one row per customer-month into summary_saas_unit_economics with fields cid, ym, cohort_month (first qualifying invoice month), monthly_cm contribution margin dollars, blended_cac_cohort allocation when allocated—required before streamstats panels activate.

Step 2 — Create the search and alerts
Paste the SPL from the spl field; retarget sourcetype strings to live charter names; widen earliest=-395d when billing history exceeds thirteen rolling months.

Mechanics recap: blended_cac divides ERP sm_spend by logo counts after coalesce(AccountId,customer_id,account_id,organization_id); contribution_per_month equals monthly_arpu multiplied by gm_pct from gross_margin_policy.csv; simple_payback_months equals blended_cac divided by contribution_per_month; simple_ltv equals contribution_per_month divided by monthly_churn; ltv_cac_ratio divides lifetime-style numerator by blended_cac.

Tier-by-segment diagnostics: retain stats dc(cid) by ym tier segment before collapsing to fleet monthly when leadership requests seller-slice explanations; attach lookup sales_territory_plan.csv only when tier strings agree with HR roster refresh cadence.

Magic Number companion (optional parallel saved search once quarterly ARR deltas exist in warehouse facts): evaluate (delta_arr_q over prior_q sm_expense) times four—keep outside primary SPL until FP&A signs identical ARR definitions to board packs.

Cohort twelve-month cumulative recovery: the append branch in the spl field demonstrates streamstats current=f window=12 sum(monthly_cm) by cid cohort_month against summary facts—disable append until summary ingest proves non-zero row counts.

Schedule alerts when simple_payback_months exceeds twenty-four while churn_policy unchanged for two closes, or when ltv_cac_ratio drops below three point zero across two consecutive monthly snapshots—notify CFO and CRO lists before CMO escalation.

Step 3 — Validate
Reconcile blended_cac numerator to SAP FB03 line drill-downs or FP&A variance workbook within agreed basis-point tolerance—typically forty to seventy basis points when allocation differs by rounding.

Compare Splunk monthly logo totals versus Salesforce Lightning Opportunity reports filtered to identical Closed Won semantics and excluded opportunity record types used for renewals-only motions.

Cross-check ChartMogul paying account counts versus Stripe Billing customer inventory after coalescing identifiers—expect forty-eight hour webhook skew windows ChartMogul documents for Stripe-linked tenants.

Verify churn_policy.csv aligns to ChartMogul gross-logo churn versus net-revenue-retention dashboards—mixing definitions swings simple_ltv dramatically.

Contrast HubSpot closedate months against Salesforce CloseDate for multi-region teams—nine-month enterprise cycles routinely misalign expense ym buckets unless attribution windows stretch explicitly.

Validate Zuora amendment flows do not double-count upgraded subscriptions inside MRR stacks—ensure amendment rows carry delta_mrr separate from gross entries.

Step 4 — Operationalize
Publish Dashboard Studio workbook: line chart of simple_payback_months versus Bessemer-style twelve and eighteen month reference bands; radial gauge for ltv_cac_ratio against three point zero floor; matrix heatmap blended_cac by acquisition_channel versus segment; ranked table worst-payback channels with spend and logo counts; Sankey marketing programme nodes flowing through funnel counts into closed-won logos; optional bullet comparing Magic Number companion output to FP&A workbook.

Archive monthly PNG plus CSV extracts into governed evidence library with indexer retention matching audit policy; optional Splunk IT Service Intelligence KPI Services only when licence entitlement exists—mirror UC-23.8.1 operational discipline without requiring ITSI for baseline deployment.

Step 5 — Troubleshooting
• Fiscal month thirteen spikes when prior fourth-quarter accruals for sales incentive true-ups land in January ERP extracts inflate sm_spend without CRM denominator movement—compare journal voucher narratives before concluding acquisition decay.

• Paid versus organic mix shifts toward inbound search traffic lowers blended_cac mechanically though underlying paid-program efficiency unchanged—segment bills using UTMs before declaring seller productivity breakthroughs.

• Long-cycle enterprise pursuits produce expense recognition nine months ahead of Closed Won timestamps—either lag expense attribution windows or accept monthly SPL understates eventual efficiency versus cohort-board narrative.

• ASC six-zero-six capitalised commissions amortised forty-eight months diverge four-to-five multiples from cash-paid commission expense Splunk pulls when JDBC mapped only to clearing accounts—maintain dual-feed commentary for investor diligence packs.

• Salesforce Account-create timestamps disagree with HubSpot first-paid-subscription timestamps when operations relabel lifecycle stages—enforce new_customer_definition.csv single source before nightly modular inputs dedupe identities.

• Ramp-heavy account executive cohorts whose fully-loaded compensation enters numerator months six through twelve before quota-bearing productivity yields denominator logos inflate blended_cac versus mature-team benchmarks—exclude ramp hires via quota_effective_date joins when HR shares roster extracts securely.

• Brand-awareness versus demand-generation spend reclassification during annual planning reallocates numerator buckets without altering pipeline velocity—track taxonomy-version identifiers beside charts.

• Free-trial cohort conversion swings distort apparent acquisition efficiency because hosting costs remain inside numerator programmes yet recognised revenue arrives deferred—publish companion conversion denominator tiles.

• ChartMogul Stripe ingestion latency spanning twenty-four to forty-eight hours injects weekend jitter versus nightly Salesforce snapshots—prefer Wednesday-close snapshots for venture-board memos.

• Mid-month active subscriber denominators versus period-end snapshots change churn inputs feeding simple_ltv—mirror whichever churn_basis finance declares for recurring revenue disclosures.

• Gross-margin definitions excluding professional-services revenue while CRM sells blended contracts skew gm_pct downward—pull gm_pct strictly from gross_margin_policy.csv aligned to external reporting package.

• Merger-acquisition logo influx enters Stripe feeds before CRM exclusions labelled inherited recurring revenue deflate denominator-quality inflating blended_cac until ma_excluded_accounts.csv filters propagate nightly.

• Bloomberg month-end spot translation on ERP numerator versus ChartMogul contract-currency retained billing introduces cohort variance thousands—publish fx_policy_owner beside charts referencing currency_policy.csv.

• Product-led signup flows booking near-zero incremental acquisition spend yet consuming solutions-engineering hours buried inside blended engineering allocations understate fully-loaded spend unless ticketing allocation joins succeed.

• Reactivated logos resurfacing inside HubSpot deal pipelines sometimes tagged net-new while finance counts gross-new excluding resurrected subscribers—dual-definition collisions distort ratio trends until quarterly hygiene reconciles resurrected cohort tags versus churn-resurrection logic.


## SPL

```spl
index=business sourcetype="dbx:erp_sm_costs" earliest=-395d@d latest=@mon
| bin _time span=1mon aligntime=@mon
| eval ym=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m")
| stats sum(eval(coalesce(sm_cost_lc,sales_marketing_lc,amount_lc,0))) as sm_spend by ym
| join type=left ym [
    search index=business (sourcetype="salesforce:opportunity" OR sourcetype="hubspot:deal") earliest=-395d@d latest=@mon
      | eval cid=lower(trim(toString(coalesce(AccountId,customer_id,account_id,company_id,organization_id,""))))
      | eval stage_lower=lower(toString(coalesce(StageName,deal_stage,pipeline_stage,"")))
      | eval is_won=if(match(stage_lower,"closed[_\\s-]*won|won"),1,0)
      | eval cd=coalesce(strptime(CloseDate,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(CloseDate,"%m/%d/%Y"),strptime(closedate,"%Y-%m-%d"),strptime(closed_at,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"))
      | eval ym=strftime(cd,"%Y-%m")
      | eval tier=coalesce(rep_tier,sales_tier,"mixed")
      | eval segment=coalesce(account_segment,Ideal_Customer_Profile,icp_bucket,"core")
      | where is_won=1 AND len(cid)>6
      | stats dc(cid) as new_logos by ym tier segment
      | stats sum(new_logos) as new_logos by ym
]
| fillnull value=0 sm_spend new_logos
| eval blended_cac=if(new_logos>0, round(sm_spend/new_logos,0), null())
| join type=left ym [
    search index=business (sourcetype="chartmogul:mrr_event" OR sourcetype="stripe:billing_subscription" OR sourcetype="recurly:subscription" OR sourcetype="zuora:subscription") earliest=-395d@d latest=@mon
      | bin _time span=1mon aligntime=@mon
      | eval ym=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m")
      | eval payer_id=coalesce(customer_uuid,stripe_customer_id,zuora_account_key,recurly_account_code,customer_id,"")
      | where len(payer_id)>2
      | stats sum(eval(coalesce(mrr_usd,mrr_amount,mrr,0))) as mrr_usd, dc(payer_id) as paying_accounts by ym
      | eval monthly_arpu=if(paying_accounts>0, round(mrr_usd/paying_accounts,2), null())
      | fields ym monthly_arpu mrr_usd paying_accounts
]
| lookup gross_margin_policy.csv ym OUTPUT gm_pct AS gm_pct_override
| lookup churn_policy.csv ym OUTPUT logo_churn_rate AS churn_override
| eval gm_pct=coalesce(tonumber(gm_pct_override),0.72)
| eval monthly_churn=coalesce(tonumber(churn_override),0.017)
| eval contribution_per_month=if(isnotnull(monthly_arpu), monthly_arpu*gm_pct, null())
| eval simple_payback_months=if(contribution_per_month>0 AND blended_cac>0, round(blended_cac/contribution_per_month,2), null())
| eval simple_ltv=if(monthly_churn>0 AND isnotnull(contribution_per_month), round(contribution_per_month/monthly_churn,0), null())
| eval ltv_cac_ratio=if(blended_cac>0 AND simple_ltv>0, round(simple_ltv/blended_cac,2), null())
| eval bench_payback_q1=12
| eval bench_payback_med=18
| eval bench_ltv_cac=3.0
| eval row_kind="monthly_economics"
| table row_kind ym sm_spend new_logos blended_cac monthly_arpu gm_pct contribution_per_month simple_payback_months simple_ltv ltv_cac_ratio paying_accounts bench_payback_q1 bench_payback_med bench_ltv_cac
| append maxout=20000 [
    search index=summary_saas_unit_economics earliest=-800d@d latest=@mon
      | bin _time span=1mon aligntime=@mon
      | eval ym=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m")
      | eval cohort_month=coalesce(cohort_month,strftime(first_invoice_dt,"%Y-%m"))
      | eval monthly_cm=tonumber(coalesce(monthly_cm,contribution_margin_usd,0))
      | sort cid cohort_month ym
      | streamstats current=f window=12 global=f sum(monthly_cm) as cohort_cm_cum by cid cohort_month
      | eval row_kind="cohort_streamstats"
      | eval cohort_recapture_ratio=if(isnotnull(blended_cac_cohort) AND blended_cac_cohort>0, round(cohort_cm_cum/blended_cac_cohort,4), null())
      | table row_kind cid cohort_month ym cohort_cm_cum cohort_recapture_ratio
  ]
```

## Visualization

Line chart plotting simple_payback_months by acquisition cohort quarter versus twelve-month and eighteen-month Bessemer-style bands; radial gauge comparing live ltv_cac_ratio against three point zero floor; matrix heatmap blending blended_cac across acquisition channel by customer segment; ranked table surfacing worst-payback channels including spend and logo counts; Sankey diagram tracing acquisition funnel stages into closed-won logos; optional Dashboard Studio bullet comparing Magic Number companion results with FP&A workbook.
